steps.t: Éomer's Vengeance lies to the west of Thornhope. Thane Béortnoth bade you seek answers to the mystery of what occured at Éomer's Vengeance.
A thin pillar of campfire smoke can be seen to the west. You should find the camp-fire, for perhaps the friends or foes you find will have answers abo…
The men at this fishing-encampment at the edge of the Entwash and Fangorn appear friendly. You should speak to a fisherman at the camp.
